Followed exact workflow: edits in logical chunks, /codereview 3x per chunk (findings filed as codereview beads ixdj/x8nc/raqm/1tmp/ck81, all fixed). 3 clean passes with zero P0-P2 findings before closing. Test now exercises full radio/medium layer.
